metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Apurv Bazari

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Interactive wizard that analyzes your codebase and generates complete Claude tooling for AI-assisted development

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: macOS system notifications for Claude Code — get notified when tasks complete or need attention

plugins.name: devkit
plugins.description: Unified developer workflow toolkit — config-driven commit, review, lint, test, and ship commands

plugins.name: observe
plugins.description: Zero-infrastructure observability for Claude Code — tracks tool usage, skill invocations, subagent spawns, and session behavior
